subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: The whole world possesseth capacity; it doth but require teachers. Were the world devoid of capacity, the Manifestation would not have appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع عالم استعداد دارد فقط مبلغ لازم دارد اگر عالم استعداد نداشت نفس ظهور نمیشد
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @The Holy Spirit, @power of the Manifestation of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
